title: BRODSKY & SMITH SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: Notifying Investors of the Following Investigations: Veris Residential, Inc. (NYSE – VRE), XOMA Royalty Corporation (Nasdaq – XOMA), Organon & Co. (NYSE – OGN), RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE – RMAX)
author: Brodsky & Smith
description: Brodsky & Smith law firm announced investigations into four merger transactions, examining whether company boards breached fiduciary duties by failing to conduct fair processes and pay fair value to shareholders. The investigations involve Veris Residential ($19.00/share), XOMA Royalty ($39.00/share), Organon ($14.00/share), and RE/MAX Holdings ($13.80/share or stock election).

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties regarding fair process and fair value in $19.00/share acquisition
Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties; deal price of $39.00/share is below 52-week high of $42.38, suggesting potentially undervalued transaction
Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties; deal price of $39.00/share is below 52-week high of $42.38, suggesting potentially undervalued transaction

Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties regarding fair process and fair value in $14.00/share acquisition
Under investigation for potential breach of fiduciary duties regarding fair process and fair value in mixed consideration deal ($13.80 cash or stock election)

title: Veris Residential Declares First Quarter 2026 Cash Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Veris Residential Inc. (NYSE:VRE), a Northeast-focused Class A multifamily REIT, announced that its Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of $0.08 per share for Q1 2026. The dividend will be paid on April 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of a quarterly cash dividend demonstrates financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments are typically viewed positively by investors as they indicate consistent profitability and management confidence in the company's financial health.

title: Halper Sadeh LLC is Investigating Whether ACLX, VRE, EHAB are Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders
author: Halper Sadeh Llc
description: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating three companies for potential securities law violations and breaches of fiduciary duties related to their proposed acquisitions. The firm is examining whether shareholders are receiving fair consideration and whether insider benefits may be limiting superior competing offers.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is under investigation for potential securities violations and breach of fiduciary duties related to its $115.00 per share sale to Gilead Sciences, raising concerns about fair valuation and shareholder treatment.
Subject to investigation regarding potential unfair dealing in its $19.00 per share sale to an investor consortium, with concerns about insider benefits and competing offers being limited.

Under investigation for potential securities law violations and fiduciary duty breaches related to its $13.80 per share acquisition by Kinderhook Industries, questioning deal fairness to shareholders.

title: Halper Sadeh LLC is Investigating Whether ACLX, EHAB, VRE are Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders
author: Halper Sadeh Llc
description: Halper Sadeh LLC, an investor rights law firm, is investigating three companies for potential securities law violations and breaches of fiduciary duties. The investigations concern Arcellx's $115 per share sale to Gilead Sciences, Enhabit's $13.80 per share sale to Kinderhook Industries, and Veris Residential's $19 per share sale to an Affinius Capital-led consortium. The firm is seeking increased consideration and additional disclosures on behalf of shareholders.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Under investigation for potential securities law violations and fiduciary duty breaches related to its sale to Gilead Sciences, suggesting shareholders may not be receiving fair consideration.
Under investigation for potential securities law violations and fiduciary duty breaches in its sale to Kinderhook Industries, raising concerns about fair dealing with shareholders.
Under investigation for potential securities law violations and fiduciary duty breaches in its sale to Affinius Capital-led consortium, indicating possible unfair treatment of shareholders.

title: Multifamily REIT Veris Agrees To $3.4 Billion Cash Sale
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Veris Residential (NYSE: VRE), a multifamily REIT, agreed to be acquired by an Affinius Capital-led consortium for approximately $3.4 billion in enterprise value. Shareholders will receive $19.00 per share in cash, representing a 23.2% premium to the unaffected closing price. The deal is expected to close in Q2 2026, pending shareholder approval. VRE shares surged 12.46% in premarket trading.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is being acquired at a significant 23.2% premium to its unaffected closing price, representing a favorable outcome for shareholders. The stock surged 12.46% in premarket trading on the acquisition announcement, and the deal was unanimously approved by the Board of Directors.
